chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2343 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.778/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.11752/2024 3. For orders as to maintainability of petition 16.01.2025 Mr. Tanzeel Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. On the first date the following order as to maintainability was passed: “After being confronted as to maintainability of this petition seeking re- export of the cargo on the ground that it is a frustrated cargo; whereas, an ONO has already been passed, Counsel needs time to further assist the Court. At his request adjourned” Today learned counsel remained unable to assist as to how this petition can be entertained when order under adjudication has already been passed. Petition found misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
